rows.label: tlk47100042_02_msg0001
rows.name:
I never thought true heroes
would come all this way to
meet me! What an honor!

rows.label: tlk47100042_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Ever since your heroic deeds, Phonex
have left their territory to explore,
so word has started to travel!

rows.label: tlk47100042_02_msg0003
rows.name:
I'd like to travel to
places like Liberalitas
and Gula myself someday...
